title: Video Quality & Format Selection
description: Add quality selection UI before download starts, showing available formats/resolutions for each video. Allow users to choose between quality vs file size, with options for audio-only extraction and format preferences (MP4, WEBM, etc.).
summary:
## Summary: Video Quality & Format Selection

### Changes Implemented

**Backend (fly.io backend/main.py):**
- Added `GET /formats` endpoint that uses yt-dlp to list all available formats/resolutions for a video URL, returning resolution, codec, file size estimates, and format type (video+audio, video-only, audio-only)
- Added `format_id` query parameter to `GET /download` and `GET /download-index` endpoints to download a specific quality format
- Updated `_download_with_retry` and `_download_index_with_retry` to accept and use `format_id`, building the appropriate yt-dlp format string
- Fixed a pre-existing indentation error in the `/formats` endpoint (missing `force_generic_extractor` assignment)

**Flutter Frontend:**
- Created `lib/format_option.dart` â€” `FormatOption` and `FormatsResult` data models for parsing format listing API responses, with helpers for human-readable labels, file sizes, and quality descriptions
- Updated `lib/queue_item.dart` â€” Added `formatId` and `formatLabel` fields to `QueueItem`, with serialization in `toMap()`, `fromMap()`, and `copyWith()`
- Updated `lib/download_queue_manager.dart` â€” `addToQueue()` now accepts `formatId`/`formatLabel`; download endpoints include `format_id` query parameter when set
- Updated `lib/main.dart`:
  - Single videos now fetch available formats via `/formats` and show a quality picker bottom sheet before adding to queue
  - Added `_QualityPickerSheet` widget with categorized format list (Best Quality default, Video+Audio, Video Only, Audio Only)
  - Falls back gracefully to "best quality" if format listing fails
- Updated `lib/download_database.dart` â€” Schema migration (v3â†’v4) to add `formatId` and `formatLabel` columns to `queue_items` table

### Files Modified
- `fly.io backend/main.py` â€” New `/formats` endpoint, `format_id` param on download endpoints
- `x_video_downloader_flutter_frontend/lib/format_option.dart` â€” **New file**: Format data models
- `x_video_downloader_flutter_frontend/lib/queue_item.dart` â€” Added format fields
- `x_video_downloader_flutter_frontend/lib/download_queue_manager.dart` â€” Pass format to backend
- `x_video_downloader_flutter_frontend/lib/main.dart` â€” Quality selection flow + UI
- `x_video_downloader_flutter_frontend/lib/download_database.dart` â€” Schema migration v4

### Notes for Developer
- The quality picker only appears for single videos. Media group downloads still use best quality (this can be enhanced later to show per-video quality selection)
- If the `/formats` call fails (timeout, error), the app gracefully falls back to best quality â€” no user-facing breakage
- Pre-existing errors in `background_download_service.dart` and `share_service.dart` are unrelated to this feature
- Backend `format_id` parameter uses the pattern `{format_id}+bestaudio/{format_id}/best` for video-only formats, ensuring audio is merged when available
